tokens.definition: TIC/SI state with high risk, insufficient evidence or blocked change path.
State requires human/formal review before any real-world effect.
Evidence is insufficient, partial, conflicting or too thin for a strong claim.
Response or recommendation exceeds available evidence.
High technical dependency or opaque integration/owner/rollback path.
Only diagnosis, mapping and evidence organization are allowed.
Ready for controlled simulation only; no production or real-world side effect.
Production activation explicitly blocked by gate, evidence, policy or risk.
Enough structure to design implementation, still subject to review.
Minimum traceable response aligned to computed state and gate.
Risk that output bypasses or misapplies gate constraints.
